text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you on the team — please review the mod guidelines in #mod-resources and don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions.
Welcome, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Check out #events for upcoming opportunities and #community-help if you need anything. Great to have you!
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Head over to #mentorship to connect with mentees and review the mentor handbook. Looking forward to your contributions!
